<nav class="-mx-3 flex flex-1 justify-end"> @auth <a href="{{ url('/dashboard') }}" class="rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-black ring-1 ring-transparent transition hover:text-black/70 focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-[#FF2D20] dark:text-white dark:hover:text-white/80 dark:focus-visible:ring-white" > Dashboard </a> @else <a href="{{ route('login') }}" class="rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-black ring-1 ring-transparent transition hover:text-black/70 focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-[#FF2D20] dark:text-white dark:hover:text-white/80 dark:focus-visible:ring-white" > Log in </a> @if (Route::has('register')) <a href="{{ route('register') }}" class="rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-black ring-1 ring-transparent transition hover:text-black/70 focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-[#FF2D20] dark:text-white dark:hover:text-white/80 dark:focus-visible:ring-white" > Register </a> @endif @endauth </nav>
